3150730.name: REBORN
3150730.description: "Reborn" is an open-world horror game built with Unreal Engine 5, offering a chilling and immersive experience. The game places you in the heart of a mysterious, sprawling forest shrouded in secrets and riddles, all presented in a gripping found-footage style. As you navigate this eerie environment, the choices you make will shape your journey. Will you dare to explore the unsettling locations scattered throughout the forest, each with its own dark history? Or will you focus on unraveling the enigmatic riddle that haunts this place? The path you take and the fate you encounter are entirely up to you. Prepare yourself for an intense, atmospheric adventure where every decision could lead you closer to the truth—or deeper into the unknown.
3150730.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
